summary: Fixed sc.project.overview.service to extract read_group counts through a compatible helper, restoring overview cost.count to match real ledger rows and removing the false-positive cost-maintenance recommendation on project 20.

notes: The concrete overview count extraction defect identified in ITER-2026-03-31-484 is closed.
The helper was applied across the same service's grouped-count branches to avoid repeated key-shape drift.
Broader recommendation correctness still needs follow-up sampling beyond the repaired cost-count path.

next_step: Open the next low-risk audit batch to continue sampling recommendation correctness across other stage, role, and overview-counter combinations.
